'''鈭歯-n-p-zh''' ('''kananpezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lookit|lookit]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-n-p-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lookit|lookit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-n-p-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kananpezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinanpezhoko|thinanpezhoko]] || [[word:jinanpezhoko|jinanpezhoko]] || [[word:shinanpezhoko|shinanpezhoko]] || [[word:kinanpezhoko|kinanpezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-
